action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_overview
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves high-level data on fire zones (intensity, spread rate, direction), weather conditions, and current simulation time.

action_set_definitions.name: get_traffic_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Provides real-time traffic data, including Volume-to-Capacity (V/C) ratios and Level of Service (LOS) for specific evacuation routes.

action_set_definitions.name: get_facility_status
action_set_definitions.description: Checks the current occupancy and maximum capacity of designated safe zones or shelters.

facility_ids.description: List of safe zone names or IDs (e.g., ['County_Fairgrounds']).

action_set_definitions.name: get_resource_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Lists available emergency units (firefighters, police, traffic control) and their current status.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_traffic_control
action_set_definitions.description: Applies operational changes to a road segment to increase capacity (e.g., contraflow) and prevent gridlock.

action_set_definitions.name: issue_evacuation_broadcast
action_set_definitions.description: Sends mandatory evacuation orders, routing instructions, or advisory messages to specific zones.

action_set_definitions.name: deploy_emergency_unit
action_set_definitions.description: Dispatches a specific unit to a location for traffic management or fire mitigation tasks.

action_set_definitions.name: advance_simulation_time
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the internal world clock, triggering movement of residents, fire spread, and traffic updates.

state_description.fire_zones: A list of geographical sectors currently affected by fire, including their fire intensity (0-100) and spread rate.
state_description.evacuation_routes: Status of primary and secondary roads (e.g., 'open', 'congested', 'blocked_by_fire').
state_description.safe_zones: Designated shelters including their current occupancy and maximum capacity.
state_description.emergency_units: Available resources (firefighters, ambulances, air tankers) and their current status ('idle', 'en_route', 'active').
state_description.simulation_time: Elapsed minutes since the start of the emergency coordination.

emergency_units.current_broadcast: EMERGENCY: ALL RESIDENTS IN ALPHA AND BRAVO SECTORS EVACUATE IMMEDIATELY VIA HWY 9.

emergency_units.current_message: EVACUATE NOW - ALL ZONES USE HWY 9
